mapper.select:
SELECT a.*, u.username, u.nick_name FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.deleted = 0
AND ${ew.sqlSegment}

SELECT a.*, u.username, u.nick_name FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.deleted = 0
AND ${ew.sqlSegment}
SELECT a.*, u.username FROM t_article a LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON a.user_id = u.user_id WHERE a.article_id = #{articleId}
